meta.report_title: Lumentum Holdings (LITE) — Optical Components for AI

scqa.situation: Lumentum Holdings is a pure-play optical components company serving cloud datacenter, telecom, and industrial markets. The company completed its acquisition of Cloud Light (EO) in Q3 FY2024, which transformed its datacenter transceiver capability. Q3 FY2026 revenue (period ended March 29, 2026) was $808.4M, up 134% YoY, with gross margin 44.2% (non-GAAP). Non-GAAP EPS was $2.37 on revenue that was 94% above the prior year quarter ($416.5M). Cloud & Networking segment grew to $541.5M (67% of revenue), led by 800G EML transceivers and coherent DWDM components.
scqa.complication: Lumentum's 3D sensing / consumer laser business (Industrial & Other segment) is declining as Apple iPhone Face ID suppliers face a product cycle plateau. This segment contributed only $128.4M in Q3 FY2026 (16% of revenue). GAAP net income was -$1.8M (near breakeven) due to acquisition amortization ($48M/quarter). Telecom Component segment ($138.5M, 17% of revenue) faces recovery uncertainty as carrier capex remains cautious.
scqa.question: Can Lumentum's AI-driven datacenter transceiver momentum sustain the elevated revenue base and justify continued P/E multiple expansion, despite consumer laser headwinds?
scqa.answer: Yes, with high conviction. Cloud & Networking is now 67% of revenue and growing at 80%+ YoY. Management guided Q4 FY2026 revenue $840-880M (midpoint $860M) with non-GAAP gross margin 44.0-46.0% — acceleration. EML transceiver and 1.6T qualification status gives Lumentum a 12-18 month technology lead over InnoLight. Base case 12-month price target: US$105.

key_points: Cloud & Networking revenue $541.5M in Q3 FY2026, up 80% YoY, driven by 800G EML transceivers and coherent DWDM for hyperscaler AI clusters
Q4 FY2026 guidance: revenue $840-880M (midpoint $860M); non-GAAP gross margin 44.0-46.0%; non-GAAP EPS $2.50-2.90
Net cash position: $1.2B (no net debt), providing strategic flexibility for R&D and capex without leverage risk
EML technology advantage: Lumentum EML lasers used in 75% of 400G DR4 transceivers globally; extending leadership to 800G and 1.6T
1.6T transceiver sampling to Tier-1 hyperscalers in Q4 FY2026; qualification expected Q1 FY2027

company_data.description: Lumentum Holdings is a leading provider of optical and photonic products for optical networks and laser applications. Post-Cloud Light acquisition, the company is one of two Tier-1 suppliers of EML-based 800G datacenter transceivers globally (alongside Coherent). Lumentum's technology spans single-mode EML lasers (critical for 500m+ reach), coherent DWDM components (ROADMs, amplifiers), VCSEL arrays (3D sensing), and solid-state lasers for industrial applications.

segments.name: Cloud & Networking
segments.description: 800G/400G EML datacenter transceivers, coherent DWDM optical engines, ROADMs for hyperscalers and telecom carriers. Q3 FY2026: $541.5M

segments.name: Telecom Components
segments.description: ROADM line system cards, amplifiers, tunable lasers for carrier networks. Q3 FY2026: $138.5M

segments.name: Industrial & Other
segments.description: VCSEL arrays for 3D sensing (iPhone Face ID), solid-state lasers for industrial/defense. Q3 FY2026: $128.4M

balance_sheet.source: Lumentum Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-05, Balance Sheet as of March 29, 2026

financials.source: Lumentum Holdings Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-05 (SEC EDGAR CIK 0001633978, period ended 2026-03-29) and 8-K earnings release filed 2026-05-05

management_quotes.speaker: Alan Lowe, President & CEO
management_quotes.quote: Our Cloud & Networking business had another exceptional quarter with 800G revenue up significantly year-over-year. We are on track to sample 1.6T products to leading hyperscalers in Q4 and expect qualification revenue in Q1 fiscal 2027. The demand signals from our largest cloud customers remain very strong.
management_quotes.source: Lumentum Holdings 8-K Exhibit 99.1 (earnings release), filed 2026-05-05, SEC EDGAR CIK 0001633978

management_quotes.speaker: Wajid Ali, CFO
management_quotes.quote: We generated $162 million of free cash flow in Q3, ending the quarter with $1.2 billion in cash and investments. Our strong balance sheet allows us to continue investing in next-generation 1.6T technology while returning capital to shareholders through share repurchases.
management_quotes.source: Lumentum Holdings 8-K Exhibit 99.1 (earnings release), filed 2026-05-05, SEC EDGAR CIK 0001633978

product_deep_dive.why_key: Lumentum's EML-based 800G transceiver is the company's highest-ASP, highest-margin product (estimated ASP $800-1,200 vs $150-250 for older VCSEL-based). Cloud & Networking segment is now 67% of total revenue and growing at 80% YoY. EML technology enables 500m+ single-mode reach required by hyperscaler AI cluster architectures.

specs.detail: DR8: 500m; FR8: 2km; LR8: 10km — all single-mode fiber
One of 2 Tier-1 global EML 800G suppliers; estimated 30-35% market share

product_deep_dive.market_size: Global 800G transceiver TAM: US$3.2B in 2025, growing to US$7.5B by 2027 (CAGR 53%). Lumentum market share estimated 30-35% in 800G EML segment (higher share than 400G period due to vertical integration advantage).
product_deep_dive.revenue_contribution: Cloud & Networking segment $541.5M in Q3 FY2026 (67% of total); 800G transceivers estimated $300-350M of segment revenue (company does not disclose product-level breakdowns)

positive.label: Hyperscaler qualification lead (1.6T sampling Q4 FY2026)

negative.label: 3D sensing / consumer laser declining (iPhone Face ID)
Telecom segment recovery uncertain (carrier capex slow)

technical.volume_trend: 成交量在 Q3 法說後放大，顯示機構建倉跡象
technical.note: 中期趨勢向上，短期接近壓力位，法說催化劑前觀望

cashflow.title: 現金流分析（Q3 FY2026）
cashflow.lead: Q3 FY2026 FCF $162M（CFO $185M - Capex $23M），連續 3 季正向 FCF。現金餘額 $1.2B，無淨負債。

cff.label: FCF Q3 FY2026
cff.note: CFO Wajid Ali verbatim, earnings call 2026-05-05

cashflow.fcf_note: FY2026E 全年 FCF 估 $550M（基礎情境），FCF yield ~9.5%（基於 $5.8B 市值）。

runway.note: 轉換票據已於 FY2024 到期償還
無槓桿，最強資產負債表

cashflow.runway_conclusion: Lumentum 是光學組件股中少見的淨現金公司，$1.2B 現金提供 R&D 投資、回購及潛在收購的彈性。資本配置風險極低。

bear.label: 保守
bear.assumption: 1.6T ramp delayed to FY2028; Consumer laser 3D sensing revenue falls below $80M/quarter; Cloud & Networking growth decelerates to 20% YoY in FY2027; NTM EPS $6 → P/E 10x = $58

base.label: 基本
base.assumption: 1.6T qualification H1 FY2027; Cloud & Networking maintains 50% YoY growth; FY2027 non-GAAP EPS $10; P/E 10.5x = $105

bull.label: 樂觀
bull.assumption: 1.6T ramp ahead of schedule; Lumentum wins additional hyperscaler 1.6T sockets displacing Coherent; FY2027 EPS $12 × P/E 12x = $144

risks.title: 客戶集中風險
risks.detail: 1-2 Tier-1 hyperscalers 估計佔 Cloud & Networking 50%+ 營收。單一客戶設計改變（如 CPO 轉向）即重大衝擊，嚴重性：高

risks.title: 3D 感測業務持續萎縮
risks.detail: iPhone Face ID VCSEL 業務面臨手機出貨平台期，Industrial & Other 季度收入從 2022 峰值 $200M+ 降至 $128M，嚴重性：中

risks.title: CPO 替代風險
risks.detail: NVIDIA 及 Intel 推動 CoPackaged Optics 可能在 2028-2029 開始替代外部收發器模組，壓縮長期 TAM，嚴重性：中

risks.title: 競爭加劇（InnoLight、中國廠商）
risks.detail: 中國光模組廠商在 800G 市場快速追趕，可能在價格敏感客戶處侵蝕市占，嚴重性：中

risks.title: 電信部門復甦延遲
risks.detail: Telecom Components $138.5M/季，若全球電信商 capex 持續謹慎，復甦時間軸延後壓縮整體成長，嚴重性：低

catalysts.title: Q4 FY2026 法說會（預計 Aug 2026）
catalysts.detail: 確認 FY2027 年度展望、1.6T 量產時間及電信復甦跡象

catalysts.title: 1.6T 收發器正式出貨（Q1 FY2027 預計）
catalysts.detail: 里程碑事件，將推動 Cloud & Networking 再加速

catalysts.title: Apple iPhone 18 3D 感測訂單確認
catalysts.detail: Consumer VCSEL 業務若獲新一代設計確認，可消除下行擔憂

catalysts.title: 電信 ROADM 需求復甦（H2 2026）
catalysts.detail: AT&T、Verizon capex 計畫確認，Telecom Component 回升

supply_chain.description: Lumentum is vertically integrated from EML laser die to finished transceiver. In-house EML laser fabrication at San Jose, CA (chip-on-carrier process). Module assembly at Thailand (post-Cloud Light acquisition). VCSEL arrays manufactured at San Jose. Key: Lumentum owns the critical EML photonic IC layer, giving it cost and IP protection vs assembly-only competitors.

industry.name: Optical Transceivers for AI Infrastructure
drivers: AI training GPU cluster buildout requiring 800G+ interconnect
Coherent DWDM needed for 400ZR long-haul links between AI data centers
industry.competitive_dynamics: EML 800G market is duopoly between Lumentum and Coherent (estimated 65% combined share). InnoLight and Chinese vendors compete at lower price points. Qualification barrier creates 12-18 month lead time advantage for incumbents.

bull_reasons: EML 800G 收發器全球雙寡佔，市占率 30-35%，1.6T 技術領先
Cloud & Networking YoY +80%，Q4 FY2026 指引加速（$860M 中值）
淨現金 $1.2B，無槓桿風險，資本配置彈性最大
FCF yield ~9.5%（基於 $5.8B 市值），估值被 EPS 成長低估
bear_reasons: 3D 感測 VCSEL 業務持續萎縮，無明確催化劑反轉
客戶集中：1-2 大客戶佔 50%+ 營收，需求週期性強
電信復甦時程不確定，Telecom Components 拖累整體成長
CPO 長期替代威脅，雖短期影響有限
key_monitor: Cloud & Networking 季度成長率（目標維持 40%+ YoY）
1.6T 收發器正式出貨時間確認
Industrial & Other（3D 感測）底部確認訊號
Telecom Components 是否開始回升（季度環比成長轉正）
Non-GAAP 毛利率趨勢（目標突破 46%+）

qa.question: 1.6T 時程是否如期？
qa.response: Q4 FY2026 取樣，Q1 FY2027 資格認證收入
qa.note: 進度符合甚至領先預期

earnings.market_reaction: 法說後股價+5.8%（次日），多家分析師上調目標價至 $95-110 區間
